< Home >

POST restapi/personal/notifications/posts/course/{courseId}/module/{moduleId}/exportCompleted/v1?section={section}&state={state}&fileName={fileName}&status={status}

Send Export completed notification. Current user will be set as an author and a recipient.

Request Information

URI Parameters

NameDescriptionTypeAdditional information
courseId

integer

Required
moduleId

integer

Required
section

Itsolutions.ItslUtils.Constants.ItslearningSectionUrlParameter

Required
state

string

Required
fileName

string

Required
status

boolean

Required

Body Parameters

None.

None.

None.
ReasonPhrase

string

None.
Headers

None.
IsSuccessStatusCode

boolean

None.
